# AGB-CRM — LLM / agent documentation index

> Curated entry points for coding agents (Claude, Codex, Cursor, Grok).
> Structure is derived into THE BRAIN graph via `pnpm brain:build` (docs corpus).
> Prefer Brain rebuild-guard search on `/brain` or `searchBrain()` for “does it exist?”.

## Portfolio map (THE BRAIN)

- [Brain ops runbook](brain-ops.md) — regenerate graph, CI, freshness, secrets

- [Brain Phase 1 build plan](requirements/brain-phase1/00-BUILD-PLAN.md)
- [Brain CRM-native UI notes](brain-crm-native-ui-2026-07-17.md)

- [VAV ↔ CaneyCloud ↔ CRM sync status](VAV-CaneyCloud-CRM-sync-status.md)
- [Integration close-loop checklist](checklists/INTEGRATION-CLOSE-LOOP-CRM-CC-VAV.md)

## RCA / agent usage

When diagnosing an incident or “does this already exist?”:

1. Search the Brain (`/brain` rebuild-guard or `searchBrain(graph, query)`).
2. Prefer hits of kind `doc` / `adr` and architecture nodes with `docs_ref` / `summary`.
3. Open the linked markdown path under `docs/` (paths are stored on doc nodes as `docs_ref`).
4. For cross-system issues, inspect interchange edges (kind `interchange`) and follow `documents` edges from related docs.
5. Cite `brain_node` ids and doc paths in the write-up; do not invent surfaces that search returns as empty (verify before building).

## Corpus model (Phase 1)

Markdown under `docs/**` is scanned on `pnpm brain:build`. Optional YAML frontmatter:

```yaml
---
brain_node: crm.capture   # join key to architecture node id
type: howto               # howto | explanation | reference | adr | failure-mode
system: crm
title: Human title
summary: One-line agent-facing summary
---
```

Doc nodes use kind `doc` or `adr` and edge kind `documents` when `brain_node` resolves.
